title.en: If any of the clones fail, the main body will a...

content.en:
The white-bearded old man first withdrew the will cores of the other clones one by one.

Airplanes!!!!

A doppelganger turned into ashes in an instant, and all power returned to the body.

Because even if the power of the clone is not returned, once it hits the realm of the Eternal Master, the other clones will be forcibly pulled into the process of impacting the Eternal Master.

If any of the clones fail, the main body will also fall.

Therefore, no one dares to let one doppelganger impact the Eternal Master, and naturally they do everything to let the ontology impact the Eternal Master.

Moreover, after becoming the eternal master, there is no way to refine a clone, only an avatar.

It is very difficult to impact the Eternal Master, the complete fusion of time and space is only a basic condition, and if you want to become an Eternal Master, you need to break free from the shackles of time and space and jump out of this category.

In this way, the Eternal Master will have the ability to cross the timeline.

Wow!

The body of the white-bearded old man has entered the place where the long river of time and space meet, and the peak Legendary Realm Lord or half-step Eternal Master of the Void Region must break through here if they want to impact the Eternal Master Realm.

Immediately, the origin of time and space came.

In an instant, the white-bearded old man noticed that everything around him had changed.

He seemed to be in a special area of time and space, and then countless gray and white silk threads ran through, piercing his body countless times.

And his entire body was imprisoned here, and he couldn't break free from 550 at all.

He naturally knew about such a situation.

These countless threads are the shackles of time and space, and he must cut these shackles before he can complete the breakthrough.

And if there are countless causes and effects in the outside world, then these threads will become extremely tough.

Therefore, before impacting the realm of the Eternal Master, it is best to cut off the cause and effect, or weaken the cause and effect, so that the success rate of the breakthrough will be greater.

With the efforts of the white-bearded old man, the silk threads were broken.

At this time, it is necessary to test the foundation.

The more Dao you master, the stronger your will, the higher your control over the Supreme Legendary Body, and so on, all of which can increase your success rate.

"These space-time threads must be cut as soon as possible, otherwise the longer the time drags on, the more powerful these threads become, and it will be difficult to cut them, and then you will definitely die!"

The white-bearded old man muttered.

Time passed slowly, the silk threads were cut one by one, and there were fewer and fewer silk threads left.

At this time, the white-bearded old man was vaguely about to break free from the restraints, at least he could move.

Break!

Break!

Break!

The white-bearded old man exerted his will in the late stage of the eighth order to the extreme, and with the power of his will, he cooperated with his eternal path and many other powers, and struggled to cut off the silk threads one by one.

Gradually, only two silk threads remained.

These two silk threads represent the ultimate time and the ultimate space, respectively, and only by cutting them off can we completely break free from the shackles and step into the realm of the eternal master.

At this time, most of the strength of the white-bearded old man had been exhausted.

He began to cut the line of space, and as time passed, under the attack again and again, this line of space was finally cut, and only the line of time remained.

"Cut off this line of time, and I can completely break through!"

"It must be fast, otherwise the line of time grows stronger, more and more tenacious and powerful, and it will be difficult to continue to cut off!"

The white-bearded old man mobilized his last strength to cut the line of time at all costs.

The strength kept running out, but the white-bearded old man finally managed to make a breakthrough.

Click!

The line of time has been severed!

In an instant, the long river of time and Kukai's energy continued to pour into the white-bearded old man's body, helping him complete the final breakthrough.

His supreme legendary body continued to evolve into a space-time control body, and the power in his body completely turned into eternal control, and even his will had completed a breakthrough, reaching the eighth-order extreme, and he was only one step away from the ninth-order will.

With the breakthrough of the white-bearded old man, the visions here were repeated, attracting the attention of many peak Legendary Realm lords in the Void Region.

After all, the long river of time and the empty sea are so surging, they can't even notice it!

Whoa!!!

One by one, the Peak Legendary Realm Lords came to Xuyang Mountain.

The Realm Glass Lord, the Tianque Lord, the Yonghe Lord, and the Five Elements Monsters, the fourth-level peak Legendary Realm Lords, all came here.

Not only that, but there were also several fifth-level peak Legendary Realm lords in the Void Region who had been hidden for countless years, and they also came here.

With their appearance, the other peak Legendary Realm lords knew that there were still so many powerhouses in the Void Region.

"I've seen the Endless Lord!"

"I've seen the Endless Lord!"

"I've seen the Endless Lord!"

One by one, the peak Legendary Realm lords said to Ye Tian with great respect and politeness.

Now that they all know Ye Tian's strength, they naturally don't dare to be polite.

"Endless Lord, what happened to Sunrise Mountain?"

The Frontier Lord asked curiously.

"The white-bearded old man is impacting the realm of the Eternal Master, looking at this vision, I'm afraid that the breakthrough has succeeded!" Ye Tian said.

"What, the white-bearded old man is attacking the realm of the Eternal Master!"

"If the white-bearded old man succeeds in his impact, then we will have another eternal controller in the Void Region!"

Many peak Legendary Realm lords are extremely envious, they also want to become the Eternal Master, but they don't even have the qualifications to impact the Eternal Master, and even if they do, they don't dare to do so.

After all, once you fail, you will inevitably fail!

Time passed slowly, and finally the vision disappeared completely, and the white-bearded old man completely completed the breakthrough.

Although the white-bearded old man has not yet completely stabilized his realm, he still appeared.

At this time, the aura on the white-bearded old man's body could not be restrained, and the powerful aura of the Eternal Controller made time and space freeze, and all the peak Legendary Realm lords could not move, as if they were imprisoned.

"Whitebeard Master, congratulations!"

Ye Tian congratulated.

The white-bearded old man smiled slightly: "Let's call me the white-bearded old man, I have used this title for countless years, and I have been used to it." "

"Congratulations to the white-bearded old man!"

Ye Tian said again.

The white-bearded old man didn't have any arrogance in the face of Ye Tian, he knew very well that with Ye Tian's background, if he attacked the Eternal Controller now, the success rate would be much higher than him, and he could almost break through one hundred percent.

But if Ye Tian doesn't attack the Eternal Controller now, he must have his own plans.

The other peak Legendary Realm lords also congratulated the white-bearded old man one by one, and the white-bearded old man responded simply, and then announced the retreat to stabilize the realm.

Void Zone.

Temple of Eternity.

The embodiment of the Eternal Master.

At this time, they were discussing the breakthrough of the white-bearded old man.

According to the custom, if an Eternal Master is born in the Void Region, share some shared treasure lands and territory resources with the new Eternal Master.

After discussing for a while, the Qinglian controller said: "When the white beard controller stabilizes the realm, discuss with him again, in short, the resources that should be given must be given." "

"That's for sure!"

The other Eternal Masters agreed. _
